value.rationale: This offering describes configurable global safety presets within Google's Antigravity product that control when the agent prompts for approval before using tools. This is a partial slice of guardrails-safety — specifically the permission/approval-gating mechanism — rather than the full suite of guardrails. It maps most closely to the existing guardrails-safety capability node, and is a feature of google-antigravity-2-0, analogous to existing nodes like google-antigravity-2-0-guardrails-safety-fine-grained-permissions-engine or google-antigravity-2-0-guardrails-safety-interactive-permission-prompts.
